identity.name: Notify
identity.core_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Glass as a Material.

usage_rules: Headings MUST use Manrope. If not available via Google Fonts, use system sans-serif but apply tracking-tight.
Body text should be readable but not boring. Use generous line height.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for track times, room codes, or technical data.

bento_grid.description: Use CSS Grid for dashboard layouts. Mix varied span sizes.

sidebar_layout.description: Fixed sidebar on left, scrollable content on right. Mobile: Bottom navigation.

jam_room.description: Immersive view. Album art central or background. Controls floating at bottom.
jam_room.style: relative flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,194,255,0.3)] transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-white/10 text-white transition-colors rounded-full px-6 py-2
buttons.icon: p-3 rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors text-white/80 hover:text-white hover:scale-110 active:scale-95

cards.glass: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 p-6 transition-all hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/20

inputs.search: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-full px-5 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50 focus:border-transparent transition-all w-full

navigation.sidebar: w-64 bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-r border-white/5 flex flex-col p-6 gap-2
navigation.mobile_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10 flex justify-around items-center z-50

hero_background.alt: Concert crowd at night with lights
hero_background.usage: Landing page hero background with heavy dark overlay

user_listening.usage: Dashboard feature card or join room background

general: You are building 'Notify', a high-end collaborative music app.
Theme: DARK MODE ONLY. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless specifically asked.
The aesthetic is 'Glassmorphism' (Mica). Every surface should feel like a piece of smoked glass.
Primary Color: Sky Blue (#00C2FF). Use it for actions, active states, and glows.
Spacing: Use double the normal spacing. Breathing room is luxury.
layout_rules: Dashboard MUST use a Bento Grid layout.
Player controls MUST be prominent and floating (glass island).
Sidebar for desktop, Bottom Bar for mobile.

component_customization.card: Use Tailwind classes to override shadcn Card. Remove bg-card, use bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl.
component_customization.dialog: Make dialog overlays backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/60. Dialog content must be glass.
component_customization.input: Remove default white backgrounds. Use transparent/glass backgrounds for inputs.

accessibility: Ensure text contrast on glass backgrounds. Use 'text-white' on dark glass.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, room cards).

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped, neon glow).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters in the UI.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
